The '''''Detainer''''' was an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==History==
Following the defeat of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Lon Donell]] seized command of the ''Detainer'' and used it for [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]] against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] shipping lanes. Donell operated the ''Detainer'' from the planet [[Barpine]], and expanded his pirate fleet by capturing New Republic vessels. The ''Detainer'' operated on a skeleton crew due to Donell's limited available manpower, and carried a squadron of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]], two [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat]]s, and two [[Gamma-class assault shuttle/Legends|''Gamma''-class assault shuttles]].
